title: malcolmia arenaria var. biloba
intro: Malcolmia arenaria var. biloba, also known as hoary whitlowgrass or hoary whitlow-grass, is a flowering plant species within the Brassicaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, and it has been used to treat various ailments in folk medicine. Malcolmia arenaria var. biloba is sometimes used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, to take advantage of its potential health benefits.
